title: Delay in refuse removal
description: GEORGE NEWS - Residents are advised that...
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Leave your garbage out for collection."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - Residents are advised that refuse collection services are experiencing delays this afternoon due to vehicle breakdowns, resulting in only 11 refuse compactors being operational.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - Residents are advised that refuse collection services are experiencing delays this afternoon due to vehicle breakdowns, resulting in only 11 refuse compactors being operational."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The refuse collection teams are continuing to work to ensure that today’s scheduled collections are completed as far as possible."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We apologise for the inconvenience caused and thank residents for their patience and understanding.\"","html":"\"We apologise for the inconvenience caused and thank residents for their patience and understanding.\""}]
bodyHtml: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Leave your garbage out for collection."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - Residents are advised that refuse collection services are experiencing delays this afternoon due to vehicle breakdowns, resulting in only 11 refuse compactors being operational.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - Residents are advised that refuse collection services are experiencing delays this afternoon due to vehicle breakdowns, resulting in only 11 refuse compactors being operational."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The refuse collection teams are continuing to work to ensure that today’s scheduled collections are completed as far as possible."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We apologise for the inconvenience caused and thank residents for their patience and understanding.\"","html":"\"We apologise for the inconvenience caused and thank residents for their patience and understanding.\""}]
teaser: Leave your garbage out for collection.
featuredCaption: Please be patient as the refuse collection teams are getting as far as the can with today's collection. Photo: File image
